// AutoLoot: Reading order: every // key is documentation; real settings follow in the same order.
// DebugLogging: When true, logs PostGenerateTreasure entry and early-return reasons to Ace_Log.
// DepositLootedCurrencyToBank: When true, looted pyreal stacks and trade notes are credited to banked pyreals.
// BankCashProperty: Must match LeyLineLedger Settings.CashProperty when using that mod (default 39999).
// LootProfilePath: Folder for .utl loot profiles. Default empty: PatchClass sets Path.Combine(ModPath, "LootProfiles").
// DefaultActiveProfiles: Archived. .utl profiles are no longer used; all banking is handled by C# code (currencies, trophies, keys, lockpicks, salvage).
// NoDuplicateNames: Name substrings (case-insensitive): skip loot if player already owns same WCID.
// UpgradedTrophyWeenieClassIds: Pass 1: pocket these WCIDs into pack before .utl (physical trophies). Includes drudge charms, rat tails, wasp wings, mob heads, quest letters. See Windblown/docs/TrophyLineRegistry.md.
// KeysUnlockThreshold: Objects unlocked with keys to unlock BetterKeys.utl and key banking.
// LockpickUnlockThreshold: Objects unlocked with lockpicks to unlock lockpick corpse-loot banking.
// SalvageUnlockThreshold: Items manually salvaged to unlock AutoSalvage.utl.
// KeyBankProperties: WCID to PropertyInt64 for key banking (must match LeyLineLedger).
// LockpickLootBankPercent: Percent of lockpick structure banked from corpse loot (0.10 = 10%).
// EnableChestAutoLoot: When true, non-house chests: autoloot on open; on close, bank leftovers + profile loot before ACE clears the chest, then material salvage if EnableDelayedSalvageSweep. House (HouseOwner) never touched.
// EnableLootStackConsolidation: When true, duplicate same-WCID stackable items in a corpse merge into one stack (e.g. multiple drudge charm entries).
// EnableDelayedSalvageSweep: When true, on corpse/chest close (non-house), BSS material salvage on leftovers. When false, skips that sweep only.
// EnableLevel8CompsConversion: When true, level 8 spellcraft comps are auto-looted as pyreal value.
// DefaultAutolootSalvageBundleApplied: When true: new chars and old prefs without AutolootSalvageDefaultsApplied get full /autoloot on + AutoSalvage once.
